calendar.matters:
Petition For (1) A Report Of Trust And Its Administration (2) An Accounting; (3) An Order Requiring Distribution Or Sale Of Trust Assets; (4) An Order
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For (1) A Report Of Trust And Its Administration (2) An Accounting; (3) An Order Requiring Distribution Or Sale Of Trust Assets; (4) An Order
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Continued To Nov-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Byrne for and with Deborah Sims (Trustee). Jennifer Jaynes for and with Oliver Sims (appeared by telephone).

Ms. Jaynes stated that the Parties came to a global settlement agreement, stated the terms of the settlement on the record, stated that her Client waived the accounting and that a dismissal would be filed within 30 days. Deborah Sims and Oliver Sims stated that they understood and agreed to all of the terms of the settlement. The matter was continued to November 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the dismissal.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
